message:
fix: gate feature-dependent test imports and suppress unused variable

- tuning_config_integration.rs: gate web and recorder-lexical imports
  behind their respective features; split t2 test so wire/ipc assertions
  are always available while web assertions require the web feature
- vendored_async_contract_behavioral.rs: gate StdError import behind
  vendored+unix cfg to match its usage
- storage.rs: allow unused rx variable (only used with asupersync-runtime)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
